nasb.text: Also let the priests who come near to the Lord consecrate themselves, or else the Lord will break out against them.”

esv.text: Also let the priests who come near to the Lord  consecrate themselves, lest the Lord  break out against them.”

cnv.text: 又叫那些親近耶和華的祭司分別為聖，恐怕耶和華忽然擊殺他們。”

ccb.text: 吩咐到我面前来的祭司要洁净自己，免得我忽然出来击杀他们。”
